description: A vertical informational graphic built on a warm, brightly-lit stock photograph of a home interior during a move: in the foreground sits a large brown cardboard moving box printed with a dark moving-truck icon, with more stacked cardboard moving boxes and a wicker basket blurred in the background near a sunlit window, on a wood floor. Overlaid text at top reads, in large bold red serif, the question 'Have you moved?' followed by bold blue serif body text 'You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.' In the lower-right corner is the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal (DHS eagle emblem) with blue serif text 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services'. The style is clean, friendly public-service design (red/blue on a soft warm photo). The messaging is a compliance reminder tied to the Alien Registration Requirement, instructing noncitizens of their address-change obligation (the tweet notes failure may result in fines or removal). Target audience is registered noncitizens. Designed agency graphic (photo with text overlay).
notable_text: Have you moved? You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.
